name: HRC_DL_VO_ATTR_MAPS
description: HRC_DL_VO_ATTR_MAPS is used to record mappings used for individual View Object attributes at import time so that they may be referenced at load time for the staged physical data row being processed.

columns.Name: VO_ATTRIBUTE_MAPPING_ID
columns.Comments: VO_ATTRIBUTE_MAPPING_ID

columns.Name: SQL_TYPE
columns.Comments: SQL type of the attribute, given in a string format.

columns.Name: VO_MAPPING_ID
columns.Comments: VO_MAPPING_ID

columns.Name: VO_ATTRIBUTE_MAPPING_HASH
columns.Comments: VO_ATTRIBUTE_MAPPING_HASH

columns.Name: VO_ATTRIBUTE_NAME
columns.Comments: VO_ATTRIBUTE_NAME

columns.Name: ATTRIBUTE_ALIAS_NAME
columns.Comments: ALIAS_NAME

columns.Name: STAGE_COLUMN_NAME
columns.Comments: STAGE_COLUMN_NAME

columns.Name: STAGE_ALT_SOURCE_SYSTEM_OWNER
columns.Comments: STAGE_ALT_SOURCE_SYSTEM_OWNER

columns.Name: STAGE_INTEGRATION_KEY
columns.Comments: STAGE_INTEGRATION_KEY

columns.Name: REF_TYPE
columns.Comments: REF_TYPE

columns.Name: REF_TABLE_NAME
columns.Comments: REF_TABLE_NAME

columns.Name: LOCAL_REF_TABLE_COL_NAME
columns.Comments: LOCAL_REF_TABLE_COL_NAME

columns.Name: REF_SUR_KEY_COL_NAME
columns.Comments: REF_SUR_KEY_COL_NAME

columns.Name: REF_INT_KEY_MAP_OBJ_NAME
columns.Comments: REF_INT_KEY_MAP_OBJ_NAME

columns.Name: HIDDEN_DL
columns.Comments: A value of H indicates this attribute should be excluded from the Data Loader generated templates and the information user interface. A value of D or null indicates the attribute should be included.

columns.Name: LENGTH
columns.Comments: Either the maximum number or characters in a string or the number of significant digits in a numerical attribute.

columns.Name: SCALE
columns.Comments: The number of decimal places to the right of the decimal point in a numerical attribute. For example, Long integers like surrogate ids have a scale of 0, floating point values like 123.45 have a scale of 2.

columns.Name: ADF_JAVA_TYPE
columns.Comments: The fully qualified java class name for an attribute.

columns.Name: HCM_LOOKUP_TYPE
columns.Comments: The lookup type if this attribute is identified as a HcmLookup.

columns.Name: UI_MANDATORY
columns.Comments: An attribute mandatory code representing one unifed mandatory status specifically for the HDL UI.

columns.Name: ADF_MANDATORY
columns.Comments: ADF API AttributeDef.isMandatory() returns true.

columns.Name: MANDATORY_ALWAYS
columns.Comments: Lookup value indicating whether the attribute is part of the Required Always (R) specification.

columns.Name: MANDATORY_ONLY_CREATE
columns.Comments: Lookup value indicating whether the attribute is part of the Required Only on Create (RC) specification.

columns.Name: MANDATORY_ALWAYS_SETS
columns.Comments: The attribute combinations that involve this attribute in the Required Always (R) specification.

columns.Name: MANDATORY_ONLY_CREATE_SETS
columns.Comments: The attribute combinations that involve this attribute in the Required Only on Create (RC) specification.

columns.Name: CREATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who created the row.

columns.Name: CREATION_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the creation of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the last update of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the session login associated to the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER
columns.Comments: Used to implement optimistic locking. This number is incremented every time that the row is updated. The number is compared at the start and end of a transaction to detect whether another session has updated the row since it was queried.

columns.Name: ENTERPRISE_ID
columns.Comments: ENTERPRISE_ID
